title: Notodanthonia picta
taxonomy: Notodanthonia picta is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the order Poales, which includes various monocotyledonous flowering plants. The genus Notodanthonia is part of the subfamily Danthonioideae, a group of cool-season grasses. Within the subfamily Danthonioideae, Notodanthonia picta is a species that is native to the southern hemisphere. Further classification of Notodanthonia picta includes it being a species of the family Poaceae and the genus Notodanthonia.
